title: SUITE_5_3_18_RENDER_DEPLOY_AND_LIVE_TEST_2026-06-01.md
text:
# Suite 5.3.18 Render Deploy And Live Test - 2026-06-01

## Scope
- Deploy Suite Control Plane Render for Nyra Suite Branch Map support.
- Test installed WordPress Suite `5.3.18`.
- Keep Nyra/Core read-only and owner-confirmed.

## Core Gate
- Deploy gate: `ALLOWED`, risk `low`, owner confirmation not required.
- Report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

## Render Deploy
- Repository: `/Users/cristiancardarello/skinharmony-ai-backend`
- Commit pushed: `607f993 Add Suite Nyra branch map to control plane`
- Service live health:
  - `ok=true`
  - `version=0.4.6-nyra-suite-branches`
  - `storage_mode=file`
  - `storage_persistent=true`
  - Universal Core configured.

## Render Changes
- Added protected endpoint:
  - `GET /api/suite/nyra/branch-map`
- Added contract:
  - `services/suite-control-plane/config/nyra-suite-branch-map.json`
- Branch count: `14`
- Safety:
  - `execution_allowed=false`
  - `owner_confirmation_required=true`
  - Core required for sensitive actions.

## Local Render Checks
- `node --check services/suite-control-plane/src/app.js`: OK
- JSON parse branch map: OK, `14` branches.
- `npm --prefix services/suite-control-plane test`: OK, Suite Control Plane smoke OK.

## Live Render Checks
- `GET https://skinharmony-suite-control.onrender.com/health`: OK, `0.4.6-nyra-suite-branches`.
- `GET /api/suite/nyra/branch-map` without key: correctly blocked with `401 suite_control_plane_key_invalid`.

## WordPress Suite Live Checks
- `GET /wp-json/shss/v1/status`: OK, Suite version `5.3.18`.
- `GET /wp-json/shss/v1/nyra/commercial-intelligence`: OK.
  - `business_brain.owner_view`: present.
  - `nyra_suite_branches.branch_keys`: `14`.
  - Includes `analytics_insight`, `crm_sales`.
- `GET /wp-json/shss/v1/waas-core/readiness`: OK.
  - Nyra owner view present.
- `GET /wp-json/shss/v1/waas-manager/control-plane`: OK.
  - Remote runtime configured.

## Sync Snapshot Status
- Core gate for `write_production` returned `REVIEW_REQUIRED` with owner confirmation required.
- Owner confirmed with:
  - `confermo sync snapshot Render`
- Manual sync executed through WordPress REST:
  - `POST /wp-json/shss/v1/waas-manager/remote-runtime/sync`
- Result:
  - HTTP `200`
  - `ok=true`
  - Suite version `5.3.18`
  - node `wp_skinharmony_mother`
  - tenant `skinharmony-suite`
  - heartbeat `200`
  - snapshot `200`
  - commerce snapshot `200`
  - snapshot id `commerce_snapshot_43034ecc-7005-43ee-b6c8-977364c96af1`
  - remote dashboard `200`
  - marketing journey dispatch `not_queued`

## Post-Sync Suite Checks
- `GET /wp-json/shss/v1/waas-manager/control-plane`: OK.
  - remote runtime configured.
  - remote dashboard OK.
- `GET /wp-json/shss/v1/waas-manager/remote-runtime/evidence-dashboard`: OK.

## Notes
- No secrets printed in this report.
- Existing unrelated dirty files in `skinharmony-ai-backend/smartdesk-live` were not staged, committed, pushed, reverted, or modified.
